micro: Roll your neck slowly — left, then right
Align your shoulders over your hips
Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds
Drop your shoulders away from your ears
Soften your eyes — blink slowly five times
Press your tongue to the roof of your mouth, relax
Stand up — just stand for 10 seconds
Close your eyes and rest them for 30 seconds
Look at the furthest thing you can see — count to 20
Palm your eyes — cup hands over closed eyes for 20 seconds
Take off your glasses and gently massage your temples
light: Standing back extension — hands on hips, arch back
Twist your spine left, then right — slow
Stand up and reach for the ceiling — hold 10s
Forward fold — let your head hang for 15 seconds
Stand and shake out your hands and feet — 20 seconds
Walk to the nearest window and look outside
Walk to another room and back
active: Take the stairs — up and down once
hydration: Drink a full glass of water
Sip water — at least half a glass
Drink water, then stretch your arms overhead
